raw_output:
The company was founded by a person who made their fortune in computer programming and had an early interest in online retailing. The founder of Amazon started the business in their garage in 1994. Initially, the company focused on selling books online, leveraging the power of the internet to offer a wide selection of titles at competitive prices.

The idea for the online bookstore was inspired by the difficulty the founder encountered while searching for a specific book in a physical store. This experience led them to create an online platform that could provide access to a vast library of books and other products, with fast shipping and competitive pricing.

Over time, Amazon expanded its product offerings beyond books to become one of the world's largest e-commerce platforms, offering a wide range of products and services to customers worldwide.
